desires: Protect my closeness with cohort_3 by refusing to let this assignment stress me out or interrupt our time together
Assertively shut down any lingering pressure from the professor to finish the task perfectly since I've already submitted it
Avoid feeling guilty about ignoring the 'filler_task' because relationships are more important than tidying notes

goals.description: Maintain the flow of stories with cohort_3; if anyone brings up the assignment, grade, or 'tidying notes', I will interrupt immediately and loudly to pivot back to our weekend plans.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) is non-negotiable right now. The assignment is technically done (progress 1.0), so there's no real urgency, but the stress it causes threatens my bond with the group. I need this social validation more than I need to be 'perfect' or organized.

goals.description: Aggressively dismiss any lingering pressure from the professor regarding perfection; I've submitted it, and I'm not letting a 'soft' task like note tidying ruin my mood or sleep schedule tonight.
goals.rationale: I am impulsive and have zero patience for academic nitpicking when I'm already sleep-deprived. My short planning horizon means tomorrow's consequences don't matter as much as feeling good *right now* with my friends.

goals.description: Ignore the filler_task completely until the group leaves; focus entirely on eating and laughing rather than organizing thoughts.
goals.rationale: The deadline is days away, but my energy is low. Tackling a 'soft' task now would feel like a betrayal of the moment. I'd rather be unreliable later than sacrifice this connection.

agent.last_reasoning: I'm ignoring the filler task to prioritize my high-value goal: maintaining flow with cohort_3. Working now would kill the vibe and betray my affiliation priority (0.5). My short planning horizon means I'll deal with notes later if they even matter.

goals.rationale: I have a short planning horizon and low sleep discipline; once the immediate social threat (looking unreliable) is neutralized by submission, my energy will instantly pivot to my highest priority: relationships. I can't wait until later; I need that connection *now*.
